t2_only.note: single-shot shell bridge; no env failures detected

environment.verdict: Not agent architecture; exclude or tag in scoring

invalid_shell.verdict: Interface failure; remediable without routing changes

agent_incomplete.verdict: Task difficulty + step budget; not primarily AA routing at pilot N

recommended_fixes.description: Tail-preserving terminal observation compression with error-line retention
recommended_fixes.expected_impact: Reduce context overflow; fewer truncated JSON responses

recommended_fixes.description: Recover commands from partial JSON; re-prompt on parse failure instead of pwd/ls nudge
recommended_fixes.expected_impact: Recover ~1 command per truncated step; eliminate blind no-op nudges

recommended_fixes.description: Convert # file: code blocks to shell heredoc writes
recommended_fixes.expected_impact: Bridge code-suite patch format to TB shell without executing Python as shell

recommended_fixes.description: Allow git, tee, systemctl, pip, uv, apt-get in sanitizer
recommended_fixes.expected_impact: Prevent false drops on server/git tasks
Reclaim wasted steps on fix-permissions-style loops

recommended_fixes.description: Emit parse_status and invalid_shell counts in trajectory envelope metrics_summary
recommended_fixes.expected_impact: Automated invalid-shell rate in future matrix summaries

recommended_fixes.description: Raise max_shell_steps to 12 for fibonacci-server and configure-git-webserver
recommended_fixes.expected_impact: Address agent_failure on multi-phase server setup

recommended_fixes.description: Run only pre-registered no-apt subset; tag apt_mirror_failure runs as excluded

rationale: Harness end-to-end stable (oracle + faithful runs complete)
17% env failure rate and 63% agent failure on hard tasks limit baseline discrimination
Need ACI patch smoke rerun (3x5 pilot) before 7x5 or 20+ task claims

smoke_metrics.note: After-rate requires T3 pilot rerun with patched code; not executed in this brief
